execution.synthesis_notes: All 13 tickers classified as WATCH by Technical Screener (candlestick sub-score 0.00 due to yfinance data gap; no ticker reaches +/-0.40 threshold). Technical blindness propagates: all intents = DEFER. No hard gates fired (no broken theses, no block news flags, no event lock, no buy candidates). news_flagged tickers [AAPL, GEV, AMD, ENPH] carry watch-level caution but do not trigger gates. Regime: NEUTRAL (VIX=20.45, 10Y=4.54%, DXY=99.73). Macro confidence: medium (May CPI due June 10, FOMC June 16-17).

fundamental_thesis.trigger_reason: All 13 tickers triggered — no prior verdicts in pipeline

verdicts.thesis_summary: NVIDIA's AI infrastructure dominance is firmly intact. Q1 FY27 record revenue of $81.6B (+85% YoY) with strong GAAP EPS of $2.39 demonstrates sustained monetization of AI compute demand. The 25x dividend increase signals management confidence in recurring cash generation. CEO Jensen Huang's bullish stance on agentic AI aligns with the next AI adoption wave. No negative fundamental developments.
key_positives: Record revenue $81.6B Q1 FY27, +85% YoY — demand not slowing
GAAP EPS $2.39 — strong profitability, not just revenue growth
Dividend raised from $0.01 to $0.25/quarter — signals cash flow confidence
Agentic AI thesis intact — next growth leg beyond training workloads
key_risks: China export restrictions remain an ongoing overhang
Competitive pressure from AMD and custom silicon (Google TPUs, AWS Trainium)
High valuation multiple requires continued execution

verdicts.thesis_summary: Credo Technology's thesis is firmly intact with explosive growth in AI networking. FY26 revenue of $1.3B (+206% YoY) and a Q4 EPS beat of +18.4% confirm strong execution. The FY27 optical DSP revenue guidance of >$600M provides visibility. The Dust Photonics acquisition expands the optical connectivity portfolio as data centers demand higher bandwidth. Growth is accelerating, not decelerating.
key_positives: FY26 revenue +206% YoY — one of the fastest-growing AI connectivity names
Q4 EPS $1.16 vs $0.98 est (+18.4% beat) — operational leverage improving
FY27 optical DSP guidance >$600M — strong revenue visibility
Dust Photonics acquisition expands optical connectivity moat
key_risks: High growth multiple; any guidance miss could trigger sharp correction
Customer concentration risk in hyperscaler AI capex
vol_ratio=2.1x suggests elevated trading activity — elevated volatility expected

verdicts.thesis_summary: Applied Optoelectronics shows exceptional price momentum (+13.9% 5d, +9.0% 1d) consistent with an AI photonics theme, but there is insufficient fundamental data to assign an intact or weakening verdict. No material news was found in the window. Strong price action without a confirmed catalyst is a yellow flag — could be a sympathy move with CRDO/STM, could be a catalyst not yet confirmed. Monitor for fundamental evidence.
key_positives: Strong price momentum — potential AI photonics read-across from CRDO/STM
MA alignment positive — price well above EMA20 and EMA50
RSI neutral (53.91) — not yet overbought
key_risks: No confirmed news catalyst for the price move
Smaller cap with higher idiosyncratic volatility (ATR=22.82, ~11% of price)
High bb_pct_b (0.84) — technically extended

verdicts.thesis_summary: Devon Energy has no current fundamental catalysts and shows weak technical structure (price below both EMAs). The energy macro is complex: CPI energy component +17.9% YoY provides an inflationary tailwind to commodity prices, but Iranian war-related supply fears are baked into oil prices with potential reversal risk. DVN's dividend yield and oil price leverage make it a macro trade, not a growth trade. Insufficient evidence to be convicted either direction.
key_positives: Energy inflation hedge — CPI energy component +17.9% YoY
Oil price support from Iran-related geopolitical tension
Dividend income at current yield
key_risks: Bearish MA alignment — price below EMA20 and EMA50
No company-specific catalysts in the window
Oil price reversal risk if geopolitical tension eases
Low vol_ratio (0.58) suggests institutional disinterest

verdicts.thesis_summary: Microsoft's fundamental thesis is intact and reinforced by Q3 FY26 results. Revenue of $82.89B (above consensus), EPS $4.27 (above $4.06 estimate), and Azure growth of +40% CC confirm continued monetization of AI cloud infrastructure. The $190B FY26 AI capex signals long-term commitment. Q4 guidance of $86.7-87.8B (Azure 39-40%) provides near-term visibility. The gross margin headwind from AI infrastructure investment is a known, transitory cost — offset by expanding cloud revenue.
key_positives: Azure +40% CC — top-line AI cloud revenue acceleration
Q3 FY26 EPS $4.27 vs $4.06 est — operational leverage intact
Q4 guidance $86.7-87.8B — above consensus
AI infrastructure $190B capex — positions MSFT as infrastructure layer for AI era
key_risks: Gross margin compression from AI infrastructure investment (down YoY)
High RSI (66.37) and elevated Bollinger position after +6% 5-day run
MSFT fell -4.2% on the day — possible profit-taking or macro CPI concern

verdicts.thesis_summary: AMD's fundamental thesis remains intact despite the Broadcom-driven sector volatility of June 5. The $10B Taiwan AI investment and GBP 2B UK AI commitment (June 8) demonstrate strategic conviction in the AI compute buildout. AMD's EPYC CPU momentum and MI300X/MI400 AI accelerator roadmap position it as the primary alternative to NVIDIA. The AM5 socket commitment through 2029 reinforces the PC/gaming platform stability. Confidence is medium (not high) due to the Broadcom AI guidance overhang creating near-term uncertainty.
key_positives: $10B Taiwan AI investment + GBP 2B UK AI commitment — strategic long-term positioning
EPYC market share gains in data center CPU — diversified revenue base
AM5 socket through 2029 — PC platform stability
Price well above EMA20 and EMA50 — longer-term momentum intact
key_risks: Broadcom cautious AI revenue guidance (June 5) created >10% drawdown — sector sentiment fragile
AI accelerator ramp (MI400) needs continued hyperscaler adoption
RSI 70.04 — technically extended after AI investment announcements
verdicts.catalyst_window: near-term (next earnings; AI accelerator win announcements)

verdicts.thesis_summary: Cameco's fundamental thesis is intact and strengthening. The Cigar Lake JV stake acquisition from TEPCO brings Cameco to 57.42% ownership, deepening control of a tier-1 uranium asset. The Urenco USA enrichment capacity expansion (+50%) is a sector-wide positive for uranium supply chain, reflecting growing demand. The nuclear renaissance thesis is supported by AI data center power demand — tech companies seeking 24/7 carbon-free power. CCJ is a direct beneficiary of the structural shift to nuclear in the AI era.
key_positives: Cigar Lake JV stake acquisition — increases ownership in tier-1 uranium asset
Urenco USA enrichment +50% expansion — sector-wide demand signal
AI data center power demand driving nuclear renaissance thesis
Strong price momentum: +11.4% 5d, +7.0% 1d — momentum confirming thesis
key_risks: Nuclear regulatory risk — project delays and permitting
Uranium spot price volatility
High Bollinger position (0.85) after strong rally
verdicts.catalyst_window: medium-term (nuclear plant agreements, AI power contracts)

verdicts.thesis_summary: Enphase Energy's near-term fundamental picture is weakening despite strong recent price performance. The stock has rallied +53.8% in a month from severely depressed levels, but the GF Value of $63.21 versus the current price of $72.33 signals overvaluation. Director Richard Mora's sale of 700 shares on June 1 is a negative insider signal. The solar market remains challenged by elevated interest rates (10Y at 4.54%), which increase the financing cost of residential solar installations. While the SST system for AI data centers is a genuine new market opportunity, it does not yet provide the revenue scale to offset solar market headwinds. The thesis is weakening — a hold/reduce rather than a new buy.
key_positives: SST system for AI data centers — new TAM >11 GW addressable by 2031
PowerMatch tech rollout — product pipeline active
Strong price recovery from deeply oversold levels validates oversold bounce
key_risks: GF Value $63.21 vs price $72.33 — modelled as overvalued at current price
Director insider selling (700 shares June 1) — negative signal
RSI 78.95 — severely overbought; high reversal risk
Solar market challenged by elevated rates (10Y 4.54%) increasing residential financing cost
Stock up +53.8% in a month — majority of easy gains may be captured

verdicts.thesis_summary: Rubrik's fundamental thesis is intact following strong Q1 FY27 results. Revenue growth of +39% YoY, ARR of $1.57B (+32%), and the first positive free cash flow quarter ($73.6M) mark a significant inflection. The raised FY27 guidance signals management confidence. The Anthropic Mythos Research Preview partnership positions Rubrik in the AI security narrative. The ~5% post-earnings decline is likely profit-taking after a large pre-earnings run, not a fundamental deterioration. Confidence is medium (not high) due to extended technical position and early-stage FCF generation.
key_positives: Revenue +39% YoY — growth rate accelerating in cybersecurity
ARR $1.57B (+32%) — recurring revenue base expanding
First positive FCF quarter ($73.6M) — path to profitability visible
Raised FY27 guidance — management confident in trajectory
Anthropic Mythos partnership — AI security narrative positioning
key_risks: RSI 77.45 and bb_pct_b=1.04 (outside upper band) — severely overbought technically
5d=+20.5% but 1d=-3.2% — momentum reversal signal post-earnings
High-multiple valuation requires continued execution

verdicts.thesis_summary: STMicroelectronics delivered a compelling fundamental catalyst: raising the 2026 data center revenue target to $1B (from >$500M) with potential to double in 2027. This is a 2x upward revision to near-term guidance driven by AI data center silicon demand. The new IIS3DWB10IS vibration sensor expands the IoT/industrial portfolio. However, confidence is medium given the stock's massive single-day move (+15.2%) creates execution risk — the market has already priced in significant optimism, and the AGM dividend of $0.36 provides only modest income. Requires follow-through on the $1B data center target.
key_positives: Data center 2026 revenue target raised to $1B (was >$500M) — 2x upward revision
Potential to double data center revenue in 2027 — significant visibility
AI-driven silicon demand validation — positioned for AI semiconductor buildout
Strong momentum: +15.2% 1d, +12.5% 5d
key_risks: RSI 80.69 — severely overbought after massive single-day move
bb_pct_b=1.18 (significantly outside upper band) — high mean-reversion risk
Near-term pullback likely after +15.2% day — requires patience
Execution risk on $1B data center target delivery

verdicts.thesis_summary: Thermo Fisher's fundamental thesis is intact across all dimensions. Q1 2026 results beat expectations and management raised FY guidance — both signals of execution quality. The launch of new Orbitrap instruments at ASMS 2026 advances the analytical instruments portfolio. The divestiture of the microbiology business to Astorg for $1.08B represents disciplined capital allocation, focusing on higher-margin segments. TMO's defensive quality characteristics (life sciences, government/pharma customers, recurring revenues) make it preferred in the current neutral macro regime. Quarterly dividend $0.47/share with ex-date June 15 provides near-term income.
key_positives: Q1 2026 beat + raised FY guidance — consistent execution
New Orbitrap instruments — innovation pipeline active
Microbiology divestiture $1.08B — capital discipline, focus on margins
Defensive quality life sciences exposure — lower macro sensitivity
Dividend $0.47/share ex-date June 15 — income catalyst
key_risks: Mixed MA alignment (Price above EMA20 but EMA20 below EMA50) — medium-term trend recovering
Government/NIH funding uncertainty (US budget environment)
Slower growth profile than high-growth AI names — upside more limited
verdicts.catalyst_window: near-term (June 15 dividend ex-date; next quarterly earnings)

verdicts.thesis_summary: Apple's long-term thesis remains structurally sound, but near-term headwinds are multiplying. The WWDC 2026 announcements (iOS 27, macOS 27 Golden Gate, Siri AI upgrades) are positive but largely in-line with expectations. The critical weakness: AI features are blocked in Europe and China due to regulatory constraints, limiting monetization in two of Apple's largest markets. More significantly, Tim Cook's announced departure as CEO in September 2026 represents material leadership transition risk — Apple's premium valuation historically prices in Cook's execution track record. The successor's capability to maintain the same operational rigor and product vision is uncertain. Combined with an overbought technical picture (RSI 75.58), the risk/reward is weakening.
key_positives: WWDC 2026 iOS 27/macOS 27 — product cycle refresh in progress
Major Siri AI upgrades — catching up with AI assistant competition
Strong price momentum 5d (+2.2%) and 1d (+2.9%) — market bid on WWDC
key_risks: Tim Cook CEO departure September 2026 — material leadership transition uncertainty
AI features blocked in EU and China — limits revenue from two major markets
RSI 75.58 — overbought; WWDC is a sell-the-news risk
High valuation multiple with regulatory headwinds on AI
Succession risk premium not yet priced in

verdicts.thesis_summary: GE Vernova's long-term energy transition thesis is intact (AI power demand, grid modernization, nuclear adjacency) but near-term fundamentals are challenged. The Massachusetts court upholding the Vineyard Wind 1 order despite losses is a negative — forced loss-generating contracts impair capital allocation. Wind CEO Victor Abate selling ~$4.57M in shares is a material insider negative signal. The stock is in a clear technical downtrend (price below EMA20 which is below the 1038 SMA20 level, down -9.4% on 5d). RSI at 34.21 and low Bollinger suggest the market is still pricing in downside. Watch — do not add to declining position but thesis has long-term validity.
key_positives: New 3.8 MW-154m onshore wind turbine and 100 MW India order — commercial pipeline active
GridOS for Transmission launch — grid software expansion
RSI 34.21 approaching oversold — potential bottoming signal
Long-term energy transition and AI power demand thesis intact
key_risks: Massachusetts court order: forced to continue Vineyard Wind 1 despite losses — negative cash flow implication
Wind CEO insider selling ~$4.57M — significant negative insider signal
Technical downtrend: price below EMA20, -9.4% on 5-day
Elevated ATR (43.28, ~4.5% of price) — high volatility; position sizing caution
Near-term uncertainty outweighs long-term thesis conviction

cross_cutting_themes.status: intact — multiple tickers confirming AI capex cycle continuation
intact — Cigar Lake expansion + Urenco capacity expansion validates thesis
emerging risk — CEO succession uncertainty new headwind
intact — preferred in neutral macro regime

ticker_news.thai_brief: NVIDIA รายงานรายได้ไตรมาส Q1 FY27 ทะลุสถิติที่ 81.6 พันล้านดอลลาร์ (+85% YoY) กำไรต่อหุ้น GAAP อยู่ที่ 2.39 ดอลลาร์ บริษัทปรับเพิ่มเงินปันผลรายไตรมาสจาก 0.01 ดอลลาร์เป็น 0.25 ดอลลาร์ต่อหุ้น (จ่าย 26 มิ.ย.) CEO Jensen Huang ยังคงมองบวกต่อการเติบโตของ AI เชิงตัวแทน (Agentic AI) ไม่มีข่าวลบในช่วง 24 ชั่วโมงที่ผ่านมา
ticker_news.english_summary: Record Q1 FY27 revenue $81.6B (+85% YoY); EPS $2.39 GAAP; dividend raised 25x to $0.25/share (payable June 26); CEO bullish on agentic AI. No adverse news.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Credo Technology รายงานผลประกอบการ Q4 FY26 กำไรต่อหุ้น 1.16 ดอลลาร์ (สูงกว่าคาด 0.98 ดอลลาร์ +18.4%) รายได้ปีงบการเงิน FY26 รวม 1.3 พันล้านดอลลาร์ (+206% YoY) คาดรายได้ optical DSP ปี FY27 เกิน 600 ล้านดอลลาร์ และเข้าซื้อกิจการ Dust Photonics รายงานวันที่ 1 มิ.ย. 2026
ticker_news.english_summary: Q4 FY26 EPS $1.16 vs $0.98 est (+18.4% beat); FY26 revenue $1.3B (+206% YoY); FY27 optical DSP >$600M guided; acquired Dust Photonics. Reported June 1, 2026.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) ไม่มีข่าวสารสำคัญในช่วง 24 ชั่วโมงที่ผ่านมา หุ้นปรับตัวขึ้น +8.99% ในวันเดียวและ +13.93% ใน 5 วัน แต่ไม่มีตัวกระตุ้นจากข่าวที่ยืนยันได้ ถือเป็น clean ticker
ticker_news.english_summary: No material news found in the 24h window. Strong price momentum (+8.99% 1d, +13.93% 5d) without confirmed news catalyst — classified as clean ticker.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Devon Energy (DVN) ไม่มีข่าวสารสำคัญในช่วง 24 ชั่วโมงที่ผ่านมา ราคาหุ้นเคลื่อนไหวในแดนลบเล็กน้อย -0.19% วันเดียว ถือเป็น clean ticker
ticker_news.english_summary: No material news found in the 24h window. Minor price movement -0.19% on the day. Classified as clean ticker.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Microsoft รายงาน Q3 FY26 รายได้ 82.89 พันล้านดอลลาร์ (สูงกว่าคาด) กำไรต่อหุ้น 4.27 ดอลลาร์ (สูงกว่าคาด 4.06) Azure เติบโต +40% (constant currency) แนวโน้ม Q4 FY26 คาดรายได้ 86.7-87.8 พันล้านดอลลาร์ การลงทุน AI infrastructure ปีงบการเงิน FY26 รวม 1.9 แสนล้านดอลลาร์
ticker_news.english_summary: Q3 FY26 revenue $82.89B vs $81.39B est; EPS $4.27 vs $4.06 est; Azure +40% CC; Q4 guidance $86.7-87.8B; $190B AI capex FY26. No adverse news.

ticker_news.thai_brief: AMD ประกาศลงทุน AI ในไต้หวัน 1 หมื่นล้านดอลลาร์ และสหราชอาณาจักร 2 พันล้านปอนด์ (8 มิ.ย.) ราคาหุ้นขึ้น +5.1% วันที่ 8 มิ.ย. แต่ก่อนหน้านั้นลดลงกว่า 10% เมื่อวันที่ 5 มิ.ย. หลังจาก Broadcom ออก guidance ระมัดระวังด้านรายได้ AI ที่ Computex 2026 ประกาศรองรับ AM5 socket ถึงปี 2029 สัญญาณสองทิศทาง — ต้องติดตาม
ticker_news.english_summary: June 8: $10B Taiwan AI investment + GBP 2B UK AI commitment; stock +5.1% June 8. But fell >10% June 5 following Broadcom cautious AI revenue guidance. Computex: AM5 socket support through 2029. Mixed signals — flag watch.
ticker_news.flag_reason: Sector volatility from Broadcom warning combined with AMD's large price swings creates near-term uncertainty; mixed AI demand signals

ticker_news.thai_brief: Cameco (CCJ) ประกาศเข้าซื้อหุ้น 5% ของ TEPCO ในโครงการ Cigar Lake JV ราคา ~115 ล้านดอลลาร์ (1 มิ.ย.) ทำให้ Cameco ถือหุ้น 57.42% Urenco USA ประกาศขยายกำลังการผลิต enrichment +50% หลายพันล้านดอลลาร์ (2-3 มิ.ย.) ส่งผลบวกต่อกลุ่มยูเรเนียมในภาพรวม
ticker_news.english_summary: June 1: acquiring TEPCO's 5% Cigar Lake JV stake for ~$115M, raising Cameco to 57.42%. June 2-3: Urenco USA announced multibillion enrichment capacity +50%, boosting uranium sector broadly.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Enphase Energy (ENPH) ปรับตัวขึ้น +53.8% ในเดือนที่ผ่านมา มี PowerMatch tech rollout และระบบ SST สำหรับ data center AI (TAM >11 GW ภายในปี 2031) อย่างไรก็ตาม Director Richard Mora ขายหุ้น 700 หุ้นเมื่อวันที่ 1 มิ.ย. และ GF Value ที่ 63.21 ดอลลาร์ เทียบกับราคาปัจจุบัน 72.33 ดอลลาร์ บ่งชี้ความ overvalued — ต้องระวัง
ticker_news.english_summary: ENPH +53.8% past month. PowerMatch tech rollout; SST for AI data centers (>11 GW TAM by 2031). But: Director Richard Mora sold 700 shares June 1; GF Value $63.21 vs price $72.33 (overvalued signal). Flag watch.
ticker_news.flag_reason: Insider selling (director sold shares June 1) combined with overvaluation signal from GF Value; stock extended after large recent rally

ticker_news.thai_brief: Rubrik (RBRK) รายงาน Q1 FY27 รายได้ 387.1 ล้านดอลลาร์ (+39% YoY) ARR 1.57 พันล้านดอลลาร์ (+32%) FCF 73.6 ล้านดอลลาร์ (เป็นบวกครั้งแรก) ปรับเพิ่ม guidance ปีงบการเงิน FY27 และประกาศความร่วมมือกับ Anthropic Mythos Research Preview แม้ราคาหุ้นลด ~5% หลังประกาศผล
ticker_news.english_summary: Q1 FY27: Rev $387.1M (+39% YoY), ARR $1.57B (+32%), FCF $73.6M (positive first time); raised FY27 guidance; Anthropic Mythos partnership. Shares fell ~5% post-earnings.

ticker_news.thai_brief: STMicroelectronics ปรับเพิ่มเป้าหมายรายได้ data center ปี 2026 เป็น 1 พันล้านดอลลาร์ (จากเดิม >500 ล้านดอลลาร์) และคาดอาจเพิ่มสองเท่าในปี 2027 (2 มิ.ย.) ประกาศเซ็นเซอร์สั่นสะเทือน IIS3DWB10IS ใหม่ (3 มิ.ย.) และ AGM อนุมัติเงินปันผลประจำปี 0.36 ดอลลาร์
ticker_news.english_summary: June 2: Raised 2026 data center revenue target to $1B (from >$500M); could double in 2027. June 3: New IIS3DWB10IS vibration sensor launched. AGM approved $0.36 annual dividend.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) รายงาน Q1 2026 ดีกว่าคาดและปรับเพิ่ม guidance ปีงบการเงิน เปิดตัวเครื่องมือ Orbitrap ใหม่ในงาน ASMS 2026 ขายธุรกิจ microbiology ให้ Astorg ราคา 1.08 พันล้านดอลลาร์ เงินปันผลรายไตรมาส 0.47 ดอลลาร์ต่อหุ้น (ex-date 15 มิ.ย.) ไม่มีข่าวลบ ถือเป็น clean ticker
ticker_news.english_summary: Q1 2026 beat + raised FY guidance. New Orbitrap instruments at ASMS 2026. Sold microbiology unit to Astorg for $1.08B. Dividend $0.47/share (ex-date June 15). No adverse news — clean ticker.

ticker_news.thai_brief: Apple จัดงาน WWDC 2026 (8-9 มิ.ย.) เปิดตัว iOS 27, macOS 27 (Golden Gate), watchOS 27 และอัปเกรด Siri/AI ครั้งใหญ่ แต่คุณสมบัติ AI ไม่พร้อมใช้งานในยุโรปและจีน (ข้อจำกัดด้านกฎระเบียบ) ข่าวสำคัญ: Tim Cook ประกาศจะลาออกจากตำแหน่ง CEO ในเดือนกันยายน 2026 — ความเสี่ยงด้านการเปลี่ยนผ่านผู้นำ ต้องติดตาม
ticker_news.english_summary: WWDC June 8-9: iOS 27, macOS 27 (Golden Gate), major Siri/AI upgrades announced. BUT: Tim Cook to step down as CEO in September 2026 — material leadership transition risk. AI features blocked in EU/China due to regulatory issues. Flag watch.
ticker_news.flag_reason: CEO Tim Cook stepping down in September 2026 is a material leadership transition; AI regulatory blocks in EU/China limit near-term AI revenue upside

ticker_news.thai_brief: GE Vernova (GEV) เปิดตัวกังหันลมบนบก 3.8 MW-154m ใหม่ และรับออร์เดอร์ 100 MW จากอินเดีย (4 มิ.ย.) เปิดตัว GridOS for Transmission ในงาน Orchestrate 2026 (9 มิ.ย.) อย่างไรก็ตาม ศาลรัฐ Massachusetts ยืนยันคำสั่งให้ GEV ดำเนินโครงการ Vineyard Wind 1 ต่อแม้จะขาดทุน และ Wind CEO Victor Abate ขายหุ้น 4,819 หุ้น (~4.57 ล้านดอลลาร์) ต้องระวัง
ticker_news.english_summary: June 4: Launched 3.8 MW-154m onshore wind turbine; 100 MW India order. June 9: Introduced GridOS for Transmission at Orchestrate 2026. BUT: Massachusetts court upheld order requiring GEV to proceed with Vineyard Wind 1 despite losses. Wind CEO Victor Abate sold 4,819 shares (~$4.57M). Flag watch.
ticker_news.flag_reason: Legal setback (Vineyard Wind 1 forced continuation despite losses) + insider selling by Wind CEO (~$4.57M) creates near-term headwinds on top of technical downtrend

AAPL.reason: CEO Tim Cook stepping down September 2026 — material leadership transition uncertainty

AMD.reason: Sector volatility from Broadcom cautious AI guidance; large price swings both directions

clean_ticker_summary.TMO: Positive fundamental news (Q1 beat, raised guidance) but no red flags

macro_inputs.jobs_data: Stronger than expected — reinforcing Fed hold

macro_intelligence.regime_confidence_rationale: CPI at 3.8% YoY is elevated (above consensus 3.7%) with strong energy component (+17.9% YoY), pushing inflation concerns. 10Y yield at 4.54% sits just above the 4.5% risk_on boundary. VIX spiked +8.1% today to 20.45, suggesting growing unease. May CPI release tomorrow (June 10) creates material near-term uncertainty. FOMC meeting June 16-17 adds another event risk layer. Jobs data strong but does not override inflation concerns.

macro_events.detail: Above consensus 3.7%; up from 3.3% March. Energy +17.9% YoY. Core CPI 2.8%.
macro_events.market_impact: Negative for rate-sensitive assets; reinforces higher-for-longer narrative

macro_events.detail: Not yet released; creates near-term event risk
macro_events.market_impact: Potential volatility catalyst — if above 3.8% could trigger risk-off; if below could provide relief

macro_events.detail: Rate currently 3.50-3.75%. Market expects hold. Held last at April 29.
macro_events.market_impact: Hold expected — neutral. Any hawkish surprise on CPI tomorrow could shift language

macro_events.detail: Stronger than expected — reinforces Fed hold expectation
macro_events.market_impact: Slightly negative for bonds (higher yields), neutral-positive for equities on growth signal

macro_events.detail: June 5, 2026 — Broadcom issued cautious AI revenue guidance, creating sector risk-negative signal for semiconductors
macro_events.market_impact: Negative read-across for high-multiple semiconductor names; AMD fell >10% June 5 on this

preferred_groups.rationale: Neutral regime with elevated CPI favors defensive quality; capital preservation bias
Profitable, cash-generative tech with AI revenue (MSFT, NVDA) can withstand yield pressure; quality factor outperforms in neutral regimes
Energy CPI +17.9% YoY; energy equities provide partial inflation hedge; uranium/nuclear (CCJ) benefits from AI power demand narrative

reduce_groups.rationale: Neutral regime with VIX elevated and CPI above target; risk premium demands profitability; speculative names face headwinds
10Y at 4.54%, CPI at 3.8%; higher-for-longer reduces present value of long-duration growth; solar/clean energy (ENPH) most exposed
Broadcom cautious AI guidance June 5 creates sector-level risk; P/E expansion unlikely with elevated rates and mixed AI demand signals

ticker_macro_flags.NVDA: preferred — quality AI infrastructure; AI demand secular, margin-accretive
ticker_macro_flags.CRDO: watch — high-multiple; AI connectivity play; vol_ratio elevated
ticker_macro_flags.AAOI: watch — pure-play AI optics; high beta; no macro catalyst support
ticker_macro_flags.DVN: neutral — energy inflation hedge offset by weak technicals and no near-term catalyst
ticker_macro_flags.MSFT: preferred — quality tech, Azure AI revenue, cash generation; preferred in neutral regime
ticker_macro_flags.AMD: watch — AI investment positive; Broadcom warning creates semi-sector overhang
ticker_macro_flags.CCJ: preferred — uranium/nuclear inflation hedge + AI data center power thesis
ticker_macro_flags.ENPH: reduce — rate-sensitive solar; overbought technically; director selling
ticker_macro_flags.RBRK: watch — cybersecurity quality growth; FCF positive but high beta; overbought technically
ticker_macro_flags.STM: watch — data center semiconductor; massive single-day move requires confirmation
ticker_macro_flags.TMO: preferred — defensive quality; life sciences; raised guidance; low macro sensitivity
ticker_macro_flags.AAPL: watch — quality but leadership transition risk (Cook departure) and AI blocked in key markets
ticker_macro_flags.GEV: reduce — wind energy legal headwinds; insider selling; technical downtrend; renewable headwinds in current rate environment

macro_intelligence.vix_note: VIX rose from 18.92 to 20.45 (+8.1%) in the session — notable spike but not crossing the 25 risk-off threshold. Likely driven by pre-CPI positioning and lingering Broadcom sector concerns. Monitor closely for June 10 CPI release.
